Girls PG near Osmanpura

Admissions & Contact

Follow this simple process to secure a bed at Jyoti Girls PG and stay connected with our admissions team.

Admission Steps

1. Enquiry & Tour

Submit the enquiry form or call us to schedule an in-person or virtual tour of the PG at your convenience.

2. Application Form

Fill in the resident details, guardian contacts, and coaching schedule. Our team assists throughout.

3. Confirmation & Deposit

Pay the token amount to block your bed. Submit the security deposit and first month's rent within five days.

4. Move-In & Orientation

Attend the orientation covering safety briefings, curfew rules, and introductions to caretakers.

Documentation Checklist

  • Passport-size photographs of resident and guardian.
  • Copy of Aadhar card or valid ID for resident and guardian.
  • Latest academic report card and coaching admission slip.
  • Medical fitness certificate and allergy declarations, if any.

Payment & Support

Payment Modes

Accepts bank transfer, UPI, and cheque. Receipts are shared within 24 hours of payment.

Parent Helpline

Call +91 99223 33305 between 9 AM and 9 PM or WhatsApp us for quick updates.

Visit Address

Vishwadeep, Jyoti Nagar, near Osmanpura, Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar, Maharashtra 431005.

Ready to Join Jyoti Girls PG?

Complete the enquiry form with your preferred move-in date, course, and room type. Our admissions counsellor will get back within one working day.

Apply via WhatsApp
